resources.string: I\'m with you, I won\'t leave you
Parental safety monitoring is active on this device
Position the QR code inside the frame
• Keep device steady\n• Ensure good lighting\n• QR code must be fully visible

WithU Familiar is a parental control app. With the parent or legal guardian\'s authorization, it collects location data in the background, even when the app is closed or not in use, to show the child device location. It can also use the microphone to detect an emergency keyword, use the camera to capture photos requested by the guardian, show a persistent service notification, and collect app usage data when Usage Access is enabled. This information is stored in the family account in Firebase and is used only for parental safety features.

WithU Familiar uses the camera now only to scan the QR code that links this device to the parent account. The QR scan reads the account email and device ID. No photo or video from this setup scan is saved.

WithU Familiar can collect which apps are used on this device and the approximate time each app stays in the foreground. This parental control feature helps the parent or legal guardian review app activity. Android will open Usage Access settings so you can allow or deny this access.

For parental safety features to keep working when the app is closed, allow background operation for WithU Familiar.

1. Open Battery or Battery usage.
2. Select WithU Familiar.
3. Choose Unrestricted or Allow in background.
4. Disable battery optimization for this app.
5. Return to the app.
WithU Familiar needs background location so the parent or legal guardian can see the child device location even when the app is closed or not in use.
1. On the next screen, open Permissions and set Location to “Allow all the time”.
2. Return to the app. For security, you may need to scan the QR code and enter the parent password again.
3. If Android opens Usage Access later, review the disclosure and choose whether to allow app usage tracking.
Important\nLocation is collected in the background only for parental safety features and is stored in the family account.
